title: Guide For New Players On Mobile
content:
First of all, welcome! As a new or returning player, there are many things that you need to daily that can easily overwhelm you.

1) War

War should not be considered for you until you get to at least lev. 35-40 (credits to Johnny Sins) or if you just wanna fight. Your main priority should be to develop yourself with economics.

2) Economy

Finish as many quests as quickly as possible to upgrade to level 7 first. Once you unlock the trade feature, look at the market. If you want to take a gamble, buy boxes. If you want to develop well, try to focus on limestone, concrete, iron and steel. This can be later used to build companies and allow people to work for you.

3)Companies

If you go to the bottom right hand side of your screen, you will see companies. Understanding how your first company works can be pretty hard. Make sure you change the resource you produce to limestone. Then simply press produce until you can't work for yourself anymore. You will then create the item out of thin air. The thing that you just used to produce is called entrepreneurship. You generate it to max every 10h, so remember to keep checking it.

If you want to work for someone, simply look for a job. You want the highest paying one at the beginning stage. Similar to working for yourself, you use energy to work. After you click work, you automatically get some money for your hard work! You can also keep track of entrepreneurship and energy centered at the top of your screen.

4) Inventory

If you go to you bottom left hand side, you will see inventory. In you inventory, you will see heaps of stuff. Crates, food, stuff you produce like iron and weapons. You can keep track of the four key resources we talked about earlier. If you gambled for crates, here is where you open them.

For your weapons, equip only common (grey) rarities. If you get green, blue, purple, yellow or red, I HIGHLY RECOMMEND you sell them at the market at a decent price. You can check prices that others are selling and adjust to it.

5) Market

Located on the bottom tab near companies, you will see the market. You can only sell and buy stuff after you reach level 7. You can sell you weapons here or buy materials that you need for your companies. Don't buy items for a high price. Make sure to check what others are selling for and then make a decision. For those of you who know a bit about stock market, check the graph and sell at the peak (usually war times).

6) Skills

Located when you click you level at the top left hand side of your screen, you can select your skills. Make sure to select the ones near the bottom that upgrade your energy, entrepreneurship and production points. This allows you to develop quicker and wait less. After you reach the stage where you unlock your third company and want to create your fourth, then you go to the bottom and expand a company so you can unlock your fourth.

7) Have Fun

We have an insanely strong community. If you don't understand something, feel free to ask. Its recommended you join War Era's discord server because you will get a quicker response. You can also chat to everyone in game by clicking the war button twice and it will be on your left hand side. If you have any remaining questions after this article, ask me in the comments section below or directly message me by clicking my profile and there will be a message button on your top right hand corner. If you want more information on a topic I covered, ask me and ill gladly publish a new article.

Make sure to explore every aspect of the game!

#STRONG_COMMUNITY
author: 69ae362f445e36e405fcc236
